title: stelis sororcula
intro: Stelis sororcula, also known as the orchid tree or lady orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis sororcula include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Stelis sororcula are often made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water to create teas or infusions.
